subcodes.first_line: This is a Book sent down by the Wronged One unto him who hath chosen for himself a path unto God, that he may render thanks unto God at every morn and eventide [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله المظلوم لمن اتخذ لنفسه الی الله سبیلا لیشکر الله فی کل بکور و اصیل
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @suffering and imprisonment
